title: Parrochute
body:
This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!
---

Parrots! Are NOT! USELESS!! Forget your glider! This is Minecraft!
Weeeeeeeeeeeeeee!

With this mod, you can slowly fall down when you have a parrot on your shoulder.
If you have two, congratulations, you got a **Parroglider**! Press shift to lift up XD
